description: Manifest V3 browser extension (WXT + Svelte 5 + TypeScript) that detects job application forms, fetches user profile from a local FastAPI server, and auto-fills fields including dynamic multi-entry sections via MutationObserver.

features.description: Create src/api_server.py — FastAPI server on port 8765 with GET /api/health and GET /api/profile endpoints that read templates/user_profile.yaml and return JSON. CORS must allow chrome-extension:// origins.
verification: Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply && source .venv/bin/activate && python src/api_server.py &
Verify: curl -s http://localhost:8765/api/health returns {"status": "ok"}
Verify: curl -s http://localhost:8765/api/profile returns JSON with name, email, and experiences keys
Verify: curl -s -H 'Origin: chrome-extension://fakeid' http://localhost:8765/api/profile includes Access-Control-Allow-Origin header
Test: kill the background server process after verification

features.description: Update scripts/run_streamlit.sh to launch src/api_server.py in the background on port 8765 before starting Streamlit, with a PID file for cleanup and a startup message.
verification: Run: bash /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/scripts/run_streamlit.sh in a subshell and kill it after 5 seconds
Verify: the script output contains a line referencing API server on port 8765
Verify: during those 5 seconds curl http://localhost:8765/api/health returns 200
Verify: after the script exits or is killed, the API server process is also terminated (no zombie on port 8765)

features.description: Populate extension/wxt.config.ts with WXT Svelte module configuration, manifest name/version/description, and host_permissions for http://localhost:8765/* and the target job site domains (linkedin.com, greenhouse.io, lever.co, myworkdayjobs.com, smartrecruiters.com).
verification: Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && cat wxt.config.ts
Verify: file is non-empty and exports a defineConfig block
Verify: manifest section contains host_permissions array with localhost:8765 and at least 3 job-site domains
Verify: @wxt-dev/module-svelte is referenced in the modules array

features.description: Populate extension/package.json with correct WXT, Svelte 5, and TypeScript devDependencies plus Vitest for unit tests. Install all node_modules.
verification: Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && cat package.json | python3 -m json.tool
Verify: package.json contains wxt, svelte, @wxt-dev/module-svelte, vitest, @testing-library/jest-dom, and jsdom
Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && npm install (or bun install)
Verify: node_modules directory exists and contains wxt and svelte subdirectories

features.description: Populate extension/tsconfig.json with strict TypeScript settings appropriate for WXT (lib: ESNext, DOM, moduleResolution: Bundler, include paths for entrypoints, components, utils, tests).
verification: Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && cat tsconfig.json | python3 -m json.tool
Verify: tsconfig.json is non-empty and contains compilerOptions with strict: true
Verify: include array references entrypoints, components, utils, and tests directories

features.description: Implement extension/utils/profile-client.ts — typed fetch wrapper that GETs http://localhost:8765/api/profile, maps the YAML-derived JSON to a ProfileData TypeScript interface, and caches the result in chrome.storage.local with a 5-minute TTL.
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/utils/profile-client.ts
Verify: file exports a ProfileData interface and a getProfile() async function
Verify: getProfile() checks chrome.storage.local for a cached value before fetching
Verify: file compiles without errors: cd extension && npx tsc --noEmit

features.description: Implement extension/utils/fieldDetector.ts — classifier (~150 lines) that scores input elements by inspecting autocomplete, name, id, aria-label, label text, and placeholder attributes against a multilingual lookup table (EN/FR/ES). Returns an array of {element, fieldType, confidence} objects.
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/utils/fieldDetector.ts | wc -l
Verify: line count is between 100 and 250
Verify: file exports a detectFields(root: Element) function
Verify: lookup table covers at minimum: firstName, lastName, email, phone, linkedinUrl, githubUrl, portfolioUrl
Verify: file compiles without errors: cd extension && npx tsc --noEmit

features.description: Implement extension/utils/shadowDom.ts — exports queryShadowAll(root, selector) that recursively traverses open shadow roots and returns all matching elements. Approximately 20 lines.
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/utils/shadowDom.ts
Verify: file exports queryShadowAll function
Verify: implementation uses recursion or a stack to traverse shadowRoot children
Verify: file compiles without errors: cd extension && npx tsc --noEmit

features.description: Implement extension/utils/dynamicFiller.ts — async orchestrator that: (1) fills detected static fields from a ProfileData object, (2) clicks 'Add experience' / 'Add education' buttons, (3) uses MutationObserver to wait for new DOM sections to appear, then fills each entry. Exports fillForm(root, profile, detectedFields).
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/utils/dynamicFiller.ts | wc -l
Verify: line count is greater than 60
Verify: file exports fillForm function
Verify: MutationObserver is referenced in the implementation
Verify: file compiles without errors: cd extension && npx tsc --noEmit

features.description: Implement extension/entrypoints/content.ts — injected into all pages. On DOMContentLoaded: scans for fields using detectFields (with queryShadowAll for shadow DOM), if >= 3 fields detected injects the AutofillBanner component, listens for a 'simpleApply:fill' custom event to trigger fillForm.
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/entrypoints/content.ts | wc -l
Verify: line count is greater than 40
Verify: file imports detectFields from utils/fieldDetector
Verify: file imports queryShadowAll from utils/shadowDom
Verify: file mounts or injects AutofillBanner component when fields >= 3
Verify: file compiles without errors: cd extension && npx tsc --noEmit

features.description: Implement extension/entrypoints/background.ts — service worker that fetches the user profile from localhost:8765/api/profile on install and on a daily alarm, caches it in chrome.storage.local, and responds to chrome.runtime messages with type 'GET_PROFILE'.
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/entrypoints/background.ts | wc -l
Verify: file exists and line count is greater than 30
Verify: file registers a chrome.runtime.onMessage listener
Verify: file references chrome.alarms or chrome.storage
Verify: file compiles without errors: cd extension && npx tsc --noEmit

features.description: Implement extension/components/AutofillBanner.svelte — floating banner injected into the host page. Displays 'simpleApply: X fields detected — Auto-fill?' with an Accept and Dismiss button. Dispatches 'simpleApply:fill' custom event on Accept. Styled to not conflict with host page CSS (shadow DOM or scoped styles).
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/components/AutofillBanner.svelte
Verify: file contains a Svelte component with an export let fieldCount prop
Verify: file contains an on:click or onclick handler that dispatches 'simpleApply:fill'
Verify: file contains a dismiss/close mechanism
Verify: styles are scoped or the component uses a shadow DOM host element

features.description: Implement extension/entrypoints/popup/App.svelte — toolbar popup panel. Displays: connection status to localhost:8765, detected field count for current tab, an Enable/Disable toggle, and a Manual Fill button that sends a message to the content script.
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/entrypoints/popup/App.svelte | wc -l
Verify: line count is greater than 50
Verify: file shows API server connection status (connected / disconnected)
Verify: file contains a toggle or checkbox for enabling/disabling auto-fill
Verify: file contains a button that triggers a chrome.tabs.sendMessage call

features.description: Implement extension/tests/fieldDetector.test.ts using Vitest + jsdom. Tests must cover: (1) email field detection by autocomplete attribute, (2) firstName detection by name attribute, (3) LinkedIn URL detection by placeholder text, (4) low-confidence / unrecognised field returns null or low score, (5) multilingual label detection (French/Spanish).
verification: Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && npx vitest run tests/fieldDetector.test.ts
Verify: all tests pass (exit code 0)
Verify: at least 5 distinct test cases present in the file

features.description: Implement extension/tests/shadowDom.test.ts using Vitest + jsdom. Tests must cover: (1) finds elements in a flat DOM, (2) finds elements inside a single shadow root, (3) finds elements nested two shadow roots deep, (4) returns empty array when no matches.
verification: Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && npx vitest run tests/shadowDom.test.ts
Verify: all tests pass (exit code 0)
Verify: at least 4 distinct test cases present in the file

features.description: Implement extension/tests/dynamicFiller.test.ts using Vitest + jsdom. Tests must cover: (1) fills a simple text input with profile value, (2) fills email field, (3) clicks an Add-button and waits for MutationObserver to resolve before filling the new section, (4) does not error when no Add-button exists.
verification: Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && npx vitest run tests/dynamicFiller.test.ts
Verify: all tests pass (exit code 0)
Verify: at least 4 distinct test cases present in the file

features.description: Create extension/tests/e2e/generic-form.spec.ts using Playwright. Spin up a local HTML fixture page with a standard job application form (name, email, phone, LinkedIn URL) and verify the extension auto-fills all fields correctly after the banner Accept button is clicked.
verification: Verify: file /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/tests/e2e/generic-form.spec.ts exists and is non-empty
Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && npx playwright test tests/e2e/generic-form.spec.ts
Verify: test passes (exit code 0)

features.description: Create extension/tests/e2e/greenhouse-fixture.spec.ts — Playwright test against a static HTML replica of a Greenhouse application form, verifying field detection and auto-fill of name, email, phone, resume URL, and LinkedIn fields.
verification: Verify: file /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/tests/e2e/greenhouse-fixture.spec.ts exists and is non-empty
Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && npx playwright test tests/e2e/greenhouse-fixture.spec.ts
Verify: test passes (exit code 0)

features.description: Create extension/tests/e2e/lever-fixture.spec.ts — Playwright test against a static HTML replica of a Lever application form (which uses custom dropdowns), verifying the extension handles both native inputs and Lever-style custom select elements.
verification: Verify: file /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/tests/e2e/lever-fixture.spec.ts exists and is non-empty
Run: cd /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension && npx playwright test tests/e2e/lever-fixture.spec.ts
Verify: test passes (exit code 0)

features.description: Create extension/utils/adapters/linkedin.ts — adapter for LinkedIn Easy Apply sidebar. Detects the Easy Apply modal, maps LinkedIn-specific field names to ProfileData keys, handles multi-step navigation (Next button) using MutationObserver to wait for each step to render.
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/utils/adapters/linkedin.ts | wc -l
Verify: line count is greater than 50
Verify: file exports an isLinkedInEasyApply() detection function
Verify: file exports a fillLinkedIn(profile) async function
Verify: file compiles without errors: cd extension && npx tsc --noEmit

features.description: Create extension/utils/adapters/greenhouse.ts and extension/utils/adapters/lever.ts — adapters for Greenhouse and Lever platforms. Each must export isX() detection and fillX(profile) functions. Greenhouse uses standard inputs; Lever uses custom dropdowns triggered by click events.
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/utils/adapters/greenhouse.ts | wc -l
Verify: greenhouse adapter line count > 30
Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/utils/adapters/lever.ts | wc -l
Verify: lever adapter line count > 40 (accounts for custom dropdown logic)
Verify: both files compile without errors: cd extension && npx tsc --noEmit

features.description: Create extension/utils/adapters/workday.ts — adapter for Workday (hardest: uses deep shadow DOM). Must use queryShadowAll to pierce shadow boundaries, detect Workday-specific input patterns, and handle the multi-page application flow. Export isWorkday() and fillWorkday(profile) functions.
verification: Run: cat /media/blarger/T7/projects/personal/simpleApply/extension/utils/adapters/workday.ts | wc -l
Verify: line count is greater than 60
Verify: file imports queryShadowAll from utils/shadowDom
Verify: file exports isWorkday() and fillWorkday(profile) functions
Verify: file compiles without errors: cd extension && npx tsc --noEmit
